trigger.Name: trLeFrancePlaceSecret
trigger.script:
local gunlist = {"pktu01","pkt01","kord01","storm01","vector01","vulcan01","rainmetal01","flag01","maxim01","pkt02","fagot01","octopus01","odin01","mrakSideGun"} local len = getn(gunlist)
for i=1,19 do --println("step"..i.."succesful") CreateBoxWithAffixGun(CVector(getPos("SecretPlace"..i.."_loc")), gunlist[random(len)], random(0, 2)) end trigger:Deactivate()
